---
title: "Research"
---

**Areas**
- Psychometric modeling and scale validation
- Meta-analytic methods and research synthesis
- Open and reproducible measurement workflows

**Selected Projects**
- *Measurement Invariance Toolkit* — Methods and software to test fairness across groups
- *Scale Audit Study* — A review of validation practices in applied psychology
- *Reliable Scores* — Practical guidance for researchers using latent variable models

**Preprints and Publications**
- Harris, M. (2026). *Title of Paper*. Journal/Preprint server.
- Harris, M., & Coauthor, A. (2025). *Title of Paper*. Journal.

**Talks**
- 2026: Invited talk on measurement bias, Conference Name
- 2025: Workshop on reproducible psychometrics, University Name
